text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Beneficiary Plan Election and Auto-Assignment │ October 2021 │ V 1.3 

9 
ENRLMT_EFCTV_DT 
LABEL: 
Beneficiary Part D Plan Enrollment Effective Date 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the date that Part D coverage began for the beneficiary. 
TYPE: 
DATE 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 
FILE(S): 
Part D Beneficiary Plan Election file 
VALUES: 
Date value formatted as: DDMONYYYY 
COMMENT: 
—
